name: Alexis, the Man of God
troparia: (Tone 4) Rich in poverty and clean of heart by virtue,* you adorned your life by partaking in the passion.* with a clean conscience you took up fasting* and persevered in prayer like an angel.* You glowed like the sun on the world, O most blessed Alexis.
kontakia: (Tone 2) You made your parents’ home that of a stranger,* and you lived in its shelter as a beggar.* When you passed from this life you were crowned in glory,* and your reputation has become magnificent on earth.* Rejoice, O Alexis, man of God and joy of angels.
